arts.ttl: Manchester United boost as Government backs Old Trafford regeneration project
arts.sum: Omar Berrada describes 100,000 super-stadium plans as a ‘once-in-a-lifetime opportunity’

arts.ttl: Man United welcome support from Government after 'once-in-a-lifetime opportunity' Old Trafford regeneration project was announced
arts.sum: A UK Treasury statement on Saturday evening said Chancellor Rachel Reeves was championing the Old Trafford project as 'a shining example' of the Government's plans to promote economic growth.

arts.ttl: “I’m aware…” – Manchester United transfer target confirms approaches
arts.sum: Lille midfielder Angel Gomes has confirmed there have been enquiries about his situation ahead of him potentially becoming a free agent this summer. The former Manchester United ace has performed well since leaving the Red Devils for more first-team football in Ligue 1, and it could be that he’ll now be heading back to the […] The post “I’m aware…” – Manchester United transfer target confirms approaches appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd welcome Government backing for regeneration project around Old Trafford
arts.sum: Options to increase capacity to 87,000 at the existing stadium or build a new ground which could hold 100,000 fans are on the table.

arts.ttl: I was a fan favourite like Alejandro Garnacho - Man United didn't show me the love I needed
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho's spell at Manchester United could be drawing to a close in a saga that feels eerily similar to one that led to another Red Devils fan favourite leave the club

arts.ttl: Arsenal youth product takes Dorgu to Man Utd
arts.sum: Man Utd have started to tire at the slow progress of the talks but a former Arsenal youth product could come to the rescue for them. A former Arsenal youth product could be the key to Patrick Dorgu finally completing his move to Man Utd .

arts.ttl: Man Utd plans for new 100,000 super-stadium gets huge boost after Government green light
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has expressed his desire to transform Manchester United’s historical Old Trafford home and a new stadium now looks likely after a major hurdle was cleared by the plans

arts.ttl: Why is Fulham vs Manchester United on at 7pm today? The reason behind the unusual kick-off time explained
arts.sum: Manchester United will look to return to winning ways in the Premier League when they visit Craven Cottage to take on Fulham this Sunday at 7pm.

arts.ttl: Napoli confirm Garnacho negotiations with Man Utd
arts.sum: However, there is a distance between Napoli and Man Utd's valuation of the player, leading the Italians to also negotiate with Borussia Dortmund's Karim Adeyemi as a backup plan for Garnacho. Napoli have confirmed that they are in talks with Manchester United over the potential signing of Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes reveals his reaction to Ruben Amorim's 'worst Man Utd team in history' comment
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has responded to Ruben Amorim's recent scathing criticism of the team.
